kelsey-brandt.position: at the sideline bench, camera-right of frame center, body angled three-quarters toward camera

pose.overall: standing relaxed at the bench mid water-break, weight on right hip
pose.left_arm: raised, holding the teal Comet Fuel shaker bottle to her lips, elbow out
pose.right_arm: bent, hand resting on her right hip
pose.hands: exactly two hands: left hand wrapped around the shaker bottle, right hand flat on her hip

kelsey-brandt.expression: eyes half-closed mid-drink, a first pleased shiver — eyebrows lifting, the beginning of a surprised smile around the bottle

spatial_rules: exactly one person in the image
exactly two hands total: left on the bottle, right on her hip
the shaker bottle contains luminous teal liquid with a FAINT simple emissive glow — DAZ prop style, not volumetric
pom-poms resting on the bench beside her
lighting: golden hour, warm rim light from camera-left, faint teal bounce on her chin from the bottle
